news.headline: Western countries are increasingly rejecting migrants, leading to a rise in anti-immigrant sentiment.
Global Blue will announce Q2 and H1 FY2024/25 financial results on Nov 22, 2024, before the market opens.
news.summary: In Signy, Switzerland, Global Blue Group Holding AG (NYSE: GB and GB.WS) will be announcing its financial results for the second quarter and half year period ended September 30, 2024, on November 22, 2024, before the market opens. The report will be released on Form 6-K and will feature Management’s Discussion and Analysis of the Financial Position and Results of Operations along with Consolidated Financial Statements, Notes, a press release, and information for investors.

news.headline: Muller family in Namibia protect endangered white rhino genetics through Rhino Momma Project. Passionate conservation effort.
news.summary: In Namibia's Kunene Region on October 17, 2024, an initiative is underway focused on the conservation of the endangered white rhino population and safeguarding its distinct genetics. The Rhino Momma Project (RMP) has been established with a dedicated commitment to the responsible and ethical preservation of these rhinos.

news.headline: Alchip shares keys to 3DIC design optimization, detailing advanced tech challenges undertaken by two industry leaders.
news.summary: Two leading companies have taken on challenging advanced technology tasks. The initiative involves significant investment, with costs totaling in the millions. The effort will require the collaboration of over 500 skilled professionals and is expected to take several years to complete. This ambitious project aims to push the boundaries of current technology and revolutionize the industry.

news.headline: Study finds skin color can affect nicotine patch efficacy, impacting 1 in 3 people.
US Treasury Secretary Yellen: Trade and investment with China must be maintained and can bring significant gains to American firms and workers.
US Treasury Secretary Yellen: China's policies are leading to industrial overcapacity, threatening American firms and workers, and hurting economic resilience.

Monroe Capital backs Izzio Artisan Bakery's growth with senior credit facility in Louisville, CO. Founded in 1994, the bakery specializes in traditional sourdough breads for U.S. grocery store chains.
news.summary: In Chicago, Monroe Capital LLC disclosed its role as the sole lead arranger and administrative agent in securing a senior credit facility to aid in the expansion of Izzio Artisan Bakery. Established in 1994 in Louisville, CO, Izzio Artisan Bakery, a family-owned wholesale bakery specializing in traditional sourdough breads, caters mainly to U.S. grocery store chains. Known for its quality, the bakery enjoys recognition from both end consumers and store buyers.

news.headline: ChipMOS to report Q3 2024 financial results; leading OSAT provider; Stock Exchange: 8150; Nasdaq: IMOS.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, in Hsinchu, ChipMOS TECHNOLOGIES INC., a prominent outsourced semiconductor assembly and test services provider, revealed its plan to release third-quarter financial results. The company is listed on the Taiwan Stock Exchange under the symbol 8150 and on Nasdaq as IMOS.

news.headline: Jujutsu Kaisen Phantom Parade hits 5M pre-registrations before Nov. 7 launch; new PV revealed. (Including date & company)
news.summary: In Shanghai on October 17, 2024, BILIBILI HK LIMITED revealed a new PV and disclosed plans for a community event. The company proudly shared that Jujutsu Kaisen Phantom Parade has achieved over 5 million pre-registrations globally. To mark this important achievement, a new promotional video will be released in conjunction with the event.

news.headline: Digitate releases ignio™ Flamingo, boosting AI capabilities for autonomous enterprises; includes unified observability.
news.summary: Digitate unveiled ignio™ Flamingo, now accessible to all customers, in Santa Clara, California. The release incorporates advanced AI functionalities across its acclaimed offerings, aiming to propel the concept of a self-sufficient business. Key aspects of Flamingo include Digitate’s combined comprehensive observability solution, improved generative AI (GenAI)-based AI Assist, the shift towards ticketless operations, and notable sustainability milestones. This marks a significant improvement in the company's services and solutions, contributing to a more efficient and eco-friendly operation.

news.headline: Intelsat introduces new satellite cellular backhaul service platform in Lagos, Nigeria, to bridge connectivity gaps in Sub-Saharan Africa.
news.summary: Intelsat, based in McLean, Virginia, has introduced a new satellite cellular backhaul service platform at the Open Access Datacenter (WIOCC) in Lagos, Nigeria. This move represents a significant step towards improving connectivity infrastructure in Nigeria and Africa. Despite some advancements, Sub-Saharan Africa still faces notable gaps in usage (59%) and coverage (15%). This new platform aims to address these challenges in the region.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Yellen: Sweeping and untargeted tariffs would raise prices for American Families and make US businesses less competitive.
WNS reports Q2 earnings for fiscal 2025, revises full year guidance.
news.summary: WNS, a global partner specializing in digital-led business transformation and services, recently disclosed its financial outcomes for the second quarter of the 2025 fiscal year that concluded on September 30, 2024. The company operates across major hubs like New York, London, and Mumbai. Known for its innovative solutions, WNS reported its earnings without specifying the figures from the source.

news.headline: RSA's Governance & Lifecycle named a leader in Identity Governance by KuppingerCole Analysts AG in 2024 report.
news.summary: In Burlington, Massachusetts, RSA, a leading identity security company, revealed that KuppingerCole Analysts AG recognized RSA® Governance & Lifecycle as a top leader in the 2024 Identity Governance and Administration (IGA) Leadership Compass Report. The report evaluates technology vendors to offer valuable insights for CISOs and security leaders overseeing IAM. RSA's Governance & Lifecycle was named an Overall, Product, Market, and Innovation Leader in the report. This signifies its top-tier performance in Identity Governance and Administration. This recognition highlights RSA's commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions in the field of security.

news.headline: Commerce Bancshares, Inc. Q3 earnings per share at $1.07, net income $138.0 million, a rise from last year, steady from Q2.
news.summary: Commerce Bancshares, Inc. reported earnings of $1.07 per share for the quarter ending September 30, 2024, a rise from $.92 per share in the same period last year and consistent with the second quarter of 2024. The net income for the third quarter of 2024 reached $138.0 million, an increase from $120.6 million in the third quarter of 2023 but less than the prior quarter's $139.6 million. The earnings per share for the nine months ending September 30, 2024, totaled $3.00.

news.headline: Kvika banki hf. to approve financial statements for Q3 and first 9 months of 2024 on Nov 6. Results to be published after market close.
news.summary: On Wednesday, November 6, the Board of Directors of Kvika banki hf. will review and approve the financial statements for the Group covering the third quarter and the initial nine months of 2024. Following the board meeting, these financial statements will be disclosed to the public after the close of domestic markets.

news.headline: Fragrance solubilizers market to reach US$ 4,061.7 million by 2034 with 5.5% CAGR growth; North America captures 31.2% share in 2024.
news.summary: The Fragrance Solubilizers Market is projected to see significant growth, increasing from US$2,377.8 million in 2024 to US$4,061.7 million by 2034, with a growth rate of 5.5%. These solubilizers are essential in blending oil-based perfumes into water-based products like personal care items, cosmetics, and household cleaners, ensuring even distribution of scents. Factors like consumer demand for long-lasting scented products and eco-friendly options contribute to this market expansion. North America is anticipated to capture 31.2% market share by 2024, while Western Europe is expected to reach a 24.2% share. Natural fragrance solubilizers are predicted to see an absolute dollar opportunity of US$977.1 million between 2024 and 2034. Non-ionic solubilizers, with a 6% market share, are estimated to be worth US$1,631.2 million in 2024.

news.headline: JCPenney in Plano, Texas, is offering exclusive new products, collaborations, and experiences for the holiday season, with 'Gotta Have It' pricing and 'Really Big Deals' along with thousands of Black Friday offers.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas, JCPenney is offering a variety of deals this holiday season, including 'Gotta Have It' pricing, 'Really Big Deals' throughout the season, and thousands of Black Friday offers. The company aims to assist customers in making the most of their holiday shopping experience.

news.headline: Workers at Pine Tree Park Care Home in Sydney are demanding a 10% raise after a six-month delay in wage increase.
news.summary: Employees of CUPE Local 3067 in Sydney, Nova Scotia, are advocating for a 10% raise that was promised to them over six months ago. They are urging their employer, New Dawn Enterprises, to implement a job classification change that will lead to the wage increase for workers at Pine Tree Park Care Home. The demonstration is set to take place at Pine Tree Park Care Home and New Dawn Properties in Sydney, where members of CUPE 3067 and their supporters will gather to push for the agreed-upon salary adjustment.

news.headline: Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. reveals Q3 2024 financial performance.
Beam Global launches BeamWell water desalination system for crisis zones, providing clean water and electricity.
news.summary: Beam Global has unveiled its latest innovation, the BeamWell™ Water Desalination and Delivery System. This system is designed to offer clean water and electricity in areas facing crises. This advancement aims to address the pressing need for sustainable solutions in disaster-stricken regions. The BeamWell™ system serves to provide essential resources through water desalination and delivery. By combining these capabilities, it offers a comprehensive approach to supporting communities in challenging circumstances. This initiative underscores Beam Global's commitment to delivering impactful technologies for those in need.

news.headline: Lixiang Education (NASDAQ: LXEH) complies with Nasdaq's minimum bid price rule after 10 days above $1 per share.
news.summary: In Lishui, China, on October 17, 2024, Lixiang Education Holding Co., Ltd. (NASDAQ: LXEH), a prominent private education service provider in China, disclosed that on October 14, 2024, it was informed by the Listing Qualification Department of Nasdaq Stock Market LLC that the closing bid price of the Company’s American Depositary Shares met the requirement of $1.00 per share or greater for the last 10 consecutive business days from September 30 to October 11, 2024. This indicated compliance with Listing Rule 5450(a)(1), and the issue has been resolved.

news.headline: Capricor Therapeutics priced a $75 million public offering of 4,412,000 shares at $17.00 per share, with an option for additional shares.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, in San Diego, Capricor Therapeutics revealed the pricing of its underwritten offering of 4,412,000 shares of common stock at $17.00 per share. Additionally, the company granted the underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to 661,800 more shares at the same price. The total offering is expected to close on October 18, 2024, pending standard closing conditions. Capricor Therapeutics (NASDAQ: CAPR) focuses on developing cell and exosome-based treatments for rare diseases.

news.headline: Kalmar will release its Q1-Q3 2024 interim report on Friday, November 1, 2024.
reAlpha's Be My Neighbor secures mortgage broker license in New Mexico, subsidiary of reAlpha Tech Corp. Nasdaq: AIRE.
news.summary: Dublin, Ohio, October 17, 2024 - reAlpha Tech Corp. (Nasdaq: AIRE), a real estate tech firm specializing in AI, has revealed the growth of its subsidiary, Be My Neighbor (BMN). BMN, a mortgage brokerage run by veterans, recently secured a broker license in New Mexico.

news.headline: Generac will release Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 31, 2024. Conference call at 10:00 a.m. EDT to discuss earnings.
news.summary: A global company, Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE: GNRC), based in WAUKESHA, Wis., revealed intentions to unveil its financial results for Q3 2024 prior to market hours on October 31, 2024. The management will conduct a conference call at 10:00 a.m. EDT the same day to delve into the key points of the report. This move indicates a significant development for the energy technology solutions and power products provider.

news.headline: UDOT partners with SVNAS to auction surplus land in Q4 2024, offering commercial, industrial, and residential opportunities.
news.summary: A significant amount of surplus land in Salt Lake City is up for bid, providing various opportunities in the commercial, industrial, and residential sectors. The Utah Department of Transportation (UDOT), in collaboration with SVN Auction Services (SVNAS), is gearing up for its year-end Q4 online auction for 2024. This auction will feature a range of properties available for bidding, presenting lucrative investment prospects for interested parties.

news.headline: 1 million public servants have student debt cancelled; other relief on hold.
Johnson Pope LLP ensures client service after crane collapse during Hurricane Milton; all personnel safe.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida on October 17, 2024, Johnson Pope Bokor Ruppel & Burns LLP confirmed that all staff members are unharmed after a construction crane fell on their office during Hurricane Milton. The incident caused significant damage to the St. Petersburg office, but no injuries were reported.

news.headline: Truist Financial Corporation reports Q3 2024 results. Earnings call today at 8am ET.(location, NYSE: TFC)
news.summary: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) disclosed their financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 in Charlotte, N.C. Interested parties can tune in to the live earnings call today at 8 a.m. ET through a webcast link (app.webinar.net/qVga5Y8KdRw) or by dialing in.

news.headline: Google Cloud research shows how generative AI can solve admin challenges in U.S. healthcare, improve systems, and enhance patient care.
news.summary: A recent report released by Google Cloud on October 17, 2024 in Sunnyvale, California, discusses the potential of artificial intelligence (AI) to enhance medical systems and facilitate improved care by doctors and nurses. The study highlights the substantial time saved by healthcare professionals with the assistance of AI. The findings suggest that gen AI has the capacity to revolutionize medical practices and contribute to more efficient and effective patient care.

news.headline: IgniteData partners with Mayo Clinic to deploy Archer platform for clinical trial data management at multiple U.S. sites.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware on October 17, 2024, IgniteData, a healthcare technology solutions company, revealed its partnership with Mayo Clinic to implement the Archer platform in various U.S. locations. This collaboration is geared towards enhancing the handling of clinical trial data.

news.headline: White Castle ranked 16th on "2024 Fortune Best Workplaces in Retail" list, reinforcing its reputation as a top employer.
news.summary: White Castle has once again been recognized for its exceptional reputation as an employer in the QSR and CPG sectors, marking the third consecutive year the company has attained this accolade. This achievement underscores White Castle's status as a leading organization in the industry. The announcement was made in Columbus, Ohio on October 17, 2024, by the company. The designation solidifies White Castle's position as a standout employer within the fast-food and consumer packaged goods industries. The company, known as the creator of The Original Slider®, has been a trailblazer in the fast-food sector and continues to excel in its field.

news.headline: World Investment Advisors partners with Raymond James to offer unique services for RIAs; solidifying position as top destination for advisors.
news.summary: A recent collaboration has introduced a distinctive service to the Registered Investment Advisor (RIA) market, solidifying World's position as a sought-after hub for high-performing advisors. Based in Santa Barbara, California, World Investment Advisors (referred to as World) is a prominent financial advisory firm that made this announcement on October 17, 2024. This strategic partnership aims to enhance the offerings available to advisors and clients in the field.

news.headline: Burford Capital discloses details for 2025 AGM, the global finance firm focuses on law.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Burford Capital Limited, a prominent global finance and asset management company specializing in law, disclosed details regarding its upcoming 2025 annual general meeting. The company, known for its expertise in legal finance, released key information pertaining to the 2025 AGM.

news.headline: Consumers Energy in Michigan conducting record number of low-voltage electric line inspections, covering distance to circle Earth.
news.summary: Consumers Energy in Michigan announced on October 17, 2024, that their inspections have covered a total distance equivalent to circling the Earth with room to spare. This unprecedented effort includes inspections on foot, by vehicle, and in all weather conditions to examine a significant number of low-voltage electric lines. The company aims to cover a record amount of these lines within the state, showcasing their commitment to ensuring reliable and safe electricity distribution for consumers.

news.headline: Socket Mobile (NASDAQ: SCKT) set to release Q3 2024 results on Oct. 17 for enhanced productivity solutions.
news.summary: A company based in Fremont, California, Socket Mobile, Inc. (NASDAQ: SCKT), known for data capture and delivery solutions that boost productivity, shared plans to unveil its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 after market hours on Thursday.

news.headline: Aquatech & John Laing provide water technology to Stegra's green steel plant with a 25-year contract for a comprehensive 'water island' solution.
news.summary: A 25-year operations contract has been awarded to Aquatech for providing extensive water management solutions. The company will implement a 'water island' concept to guarantee a comprehensive water management system for a steel plant. This system will cater to various needs including ultra-high-purity water for the electrolyzers and compact strip production mill scale.

news.headline: Kidney transplants for people with HIV, from HIV-positive donors as safe as from non-infected donors, study finds.
news.summary: A recent study conducted in New York reveals that individuals with HIV in need of kidney transplants can safely and effectively receive organs from donors who are also HIV positive. This finding suggests that the survival rates for organ recipients are comparable regardless of whether the donor is HIV positive or negative. The study highlights the viability of utilizing HIV positive donors to meet the demand for kidney transplants among HIV-positive individuals. This breakthrough could significantly impact the transplant process and help address the shortage of available organs for individuals with HIV.

news.headline: CEO confidence on the rise with 79% investing in culture & engagement. Vistage Index shows improvement in Q3.
news.summary: In a recent survey conducted by the Vistage CEO Confidence Index, it was revealed that a significant 79% of CEOs from small and midsize businesses are prioritizing investments in company culture and employee engagement as key drivers of productivity. The survey, conducted in Q3, indicated a notable increase in CEO confidence, with the Vistage CEO Confidence Index seeing a rise. This data showcases a growing focus on enhancing organizational culture and employee engagement among business leaders, highlighting their recognition of the impact these factors have on overall productivity and success.

news.headline: Milyli licenses Blackout source code for Excel redaction to Reveal Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: A significant announcement was made in Chicago on October 17, 2024, regarding the availability of Blackout for native Excel in Reveal. Milyli, the developer of Blackout, which is a leading redaction software for eDiscovery, has disclosed that they have licensed the source code of Blackout for native Excel redaction to Reveal. This non-exclusive license agreement marks a strategic move in the industry, providing Reveal, a global player, with access to cutting-edge technology. This development signifies a new chapter in the advancement of redaction software and is poised to impact the sector significantly.

news.headline: 'Experience Abu Dhabi' announced as official New York Knicks patch partner in multi-year marketing deal with MSG Sports.
news.summary: A new partnership has been announced between MSG Family of Companies and DCT Abu Dhabi, spanning multiple years and covering key assets in New York and Las Vegas. The collaboration, revealed on Oct 17, 2024, will involve Madison Square Garden Sports Corp. (NYSE: MSGS) and aims to enhance marketing efforts across significant venues. Showing a strategic alignment, this partnership signifies a notable step in leveraging the strengths of both entities in the global entertainment industry.

news.headline: 1 in 4 adults say politics impact where they live, with 1 in 5 considering moving due to differing political views.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by Realtor.com® in Santa Clara, California, revealed that close to 20% of adults have contemplated relocating due to a mismatch in their political beliefs with the majority in their vicinity. The study, conducted as the 2024 presidential election approaches, indicates that 23% of Americans are considering such a move.

news.headline: n-Butanol market projected to reach $7.50 billion by 2029 as per MarketsandMarkets™, report details released Oct 17, 2024.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report was released regarding the n-Butanol market. The report covers various aspects such as grades including industrial and pharmaceutical, distribution channels, feedstock, applications like Butyl Carboxylate, Direct Solvents, Specialty Chemicals, Rubber & Plasticizers, end-use industries, and regions globally. This comprehensive analysis provides insights into the market trends and opportunities for growth. The report is aimed at industry stakeholders and investors looking to understand the market landscape better.

news.headline: Google Cloud launched Vertex AI Search for Healthcare & updates for Healthcare Data Engine, enhancing healthcare services with tech.
news.summary: Google Cloud has unveiled new solutions on Oct. 17, 2024, to enhance medical systems and elevate patient care. The innovations include Vertex AI Search for Healthcare, along with various enhancements for Healthcare Data Engine. These updates are intended to revolutionize healthcare organizations by leveraging advanced technology.

news.headline: Smoothie King to grow presence in Colorado by 60% with new stores and franchise opportunities.
news.summary: Smoothie King is planning to expand its presence in Colorado by approximately 60%, which will include opening new stores and offering franchise opportunities. The brand, recognized as the largest smoothie chain globally and a pioneering health and fitness fast-casual concept, disclosed this information on October 17, 2024, in Dallas. This strategic expansion aims to enhance the accessibility of their products in Colorado, reflecting a significant growth trajectory for the company.

news.headline: Rocket Lab stock (NASDAQ: RKLB) is gaining premarket due to a new Electron launch named 'Changes In Latitudes, Changes In Attitudes' set for October 19, 2024, making it the company's fastest launch - all part of their on-demand launch capabilities. This will be their 12th mission in 2024, doubling their Electron launch rate.
news.summary: Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (NASDAQ: RKLB) has seen an increase in premarket trading as they announced a last-minute Electron launch named 'Changes In Latitudes, Changes In Attitudes.' This commercial mission is scheduled to take off from Rocket Lab Launch Complex 1 on October 19, 2024, for a confidential customer. Remarkably, this launch will mark the fastest turnaround for the company, completing the mission in under two months from contract signing. Rocket Lab's efficient call-up launch capability, streamlined Electron rocket production, and responsive launch sites allow for on-demand launches within days. This will be Rocket Lab's 12th mission of 2024, highlighting their increased launch rate. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Dutch company Tagologic wins AIM Allan Gillian Award 2024 for smart tagging innovation in digital data management.
news.summary: In The Hague, Netherlands, on October 17, 2024, Tagologic, a local company, received the prestigious Allan Gilligan Award for 2024 from AIM Global. This award highlights Tagologic's exceptional work in digital tagging and data management. With this recognition, Tagologic is acknowledged for its innovative approach in these areas.

news.headline: VerticalScope Holdings to release Q3 2024 financial results on November 12, 2024. Conference call on Nov 13 at 8:00 am ET.
news.summary: In Toronto, VerticalScope Holdings Inc. ("VerticalScope" or the “Company”) (TSX: FORA; OTCQX: VFORF) has announced that its third-quarter financial results for 2024 will be disclosed after the market closes on Tuesday, November 12, 2024. To delve into the Company's financial performance, management will conduct a conference call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET on Wednesday, November 13, 2024. To join the live call, registration is required at the following web address: https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/861368726.
